Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension.Extension

Packages that use Extension
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.

  • Uses of Extension in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation that implement Extension
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension
    Decorator for EvolutionaryAlgorithms to add time continuation (restarts).
    class 
    EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension
    Extends AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension to trigger restarts using ε-progress.

  • Uses of Extension in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension that implement Extension
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CallbackExtension
    Extension that invokes a callback function every iteration.
    class 
    CheckpointExtension
    Adds checkpoint functionality to an algorithm where the state is periodically recorded in a state file.
    class 
    LoggingExtension
    Extension that logs information about the execution, including the current NFE and elapsed time.
    class 
    PeriodicExtension
    An extension that performs an action at a fixed frequency, specified by its FrequencyType.
    class 
    RuntimeCollectorExtension
    Extends an algorithm to record the approximation sets at periodic intervals.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends Extension>
    T
    Extensions.get(Class<T> extensionType)
    Gets the extension of the given type.

    Method
    Description
    Iterator<Extension>
    Extensions.iterator()
     
    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension with parameters of type Extension
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Extensions.add(Extension extension)
    Adds the extension and invokes its onRegister(Algorithm) method.
    default void
    Extensible.addExtension(Extension extension)
    Adds the given extension and invokes its onRegister(org.moeaframework.core.Algorithm) method.
    void
    Extensions.remove(Extension extension)
    Removes the extension.
    default void
    Extensible.removeExtension(Extension extension)
    Removes the given extension.
    Method parameters in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension with type arguments of type Extension
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Extensions.remove(Class<? extends Extension> extensionType)
    Removes all extensions of the given type (including any that inherit from the type).
    void
    Extensions.removeIf(Predicate<? super Extension> filter)
    Removes all extensions matching the given filter.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InstrumentedExtension
    Decorates an algorithm to periodically collect information about its runtime behavior.
